channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] National Intelligence confirmation hearing highlights continued controversy around the 2020 election
item.description: The Trump administration remains closely focused on election security and the outcome of the 2020 election. National Intelligence nominee Jay Clayton dodged questions about it on Wednesday.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Search suspended for 3 missing after boat with family spreading ashes capsizes on San Francisco Bay
item.description: The U.S. Coast Guard has suspended its search for three people missing after a boat capsized near Alcatraz Island in San Francisco Bay. One person died after being pulled from the water.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Proposed St. Pete budget includes increase for public safety funding
item.description: The City of St. Pete could soon be expanding mental health services, starting with the CALL Program.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Florida fentanyl summit draws teens, grieving parents and DEA chief as crisis takes center stage
item.description: They came with questions — and answers — about how fentanyl spreads and why young people may not recognize the danger.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Epstein survivor demands Blanche be held accountable for DOJ identity exposure in the files
item.description: Epstein survivor Dani Bensky says her name, phone number and addresses were published in the Epstein Files — despite her attorneys submitting 350 names for redaction in advance. Now she wants answers.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] More police patrols coming to New Port Richey roads as safety campaign targets crashes on US 19
item.description: The New Port Richey Police Department is increasing traffic enforcement as part of a partnership with the Florida Department of Transportation's Enhanced Law Enforcement Engagement (ELEE) program.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Donalds, Jolly hold the inside track as Florida governor’s race enters final primary stretch
item.description: With Florida’s Aug. 18 primary approaching, the race for governor is increasingly centered on two frontrunners, Republican U.S. Rep. Byron Donalds and Democrat David Jolly.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] South Tampa trap caught 18,000 mosquitoes, last month just 142
item.description: Hillsborough County conducted aerial spraying early Thursday to treat a growing mosquito population – a sudden influx that’s tied to the Bay Area’s recent drought.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Robert F. Kennedy Jr. visits Tampa General Hospital to launch healthy food pledge
item.description: U.S. Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and USDA Secretary Brooke Rollins visited Tampa General Hospital on Thursday to roll out a nationwide push aimed at transforming how medical facilities feed their patients.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Suspect accused of brutally beating, disfiguring man at Bartlett Park arrested for attempted murder
item.description: St. Petersburg police arrested a 49-year-old man for attempted second-degree murder after he allegedly beat a victim at a local park and stole from his backpack.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: hurricane] [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Help remains available for Sarasota County homeowners dealing with damage from 2024 hurricane season
item.description: A local non-profit is urging Sarasota County homeowners to reach out for help as they continue to offer assistance and recovery from the 2024 hurricane season.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] 2 teens accused of stealing Camry fished out of Manatee River
item.description: Deputies arrested two teenagers Wednesday night after a wild sequence involving a stolen car and a desperate attempt to swim across the Manatee River to escape law enforcement.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] St. Wilfred’s Preschool opens educational Liberty Garden
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Cyclosporiasis case reported in Manatee County, state health report shows

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] OVERNIGHT CLOSURE: Eastbound I-4 ramp to County Line Road will close for paving
item.description: FDOT said the eastbound I-4 ramp (Exit 25) to County Line Road will close overnight from July 19 to July 23.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Trump's SAVE America Act faces steep odds in Congress as Republicans push election reform bill
item.description: Congressional Republicans are pushing a new election reform bill — but does it have the votes to pass? Here's what you need to know about the SAVE America Act and the fight ahead. 🗳️

item.title: [Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Is daylight saving time ending this year? When we set back clocks
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Save on back-to-school shopping in Florida starting next week
[The Florida Channel] 7/16/26 Capitol Update Extended: Family Says Law Addressing Dangerous Dogs is Working
item.description: 7/16/26 Capitol Update Extended: Family Says Law Addressing Dangerous Dogs is Working first appeared on The Florida Channel The U.S. Postal Service says Florida is in the top ten states for dog attacks on mail carriers. The family of a Florida letter carrier who was killed by dogs weighs in on how a 2025 law passed in her memory could help save lives. 7/16/26 Capitol Update Extended: Family Says L

[The Florida Channel] 7/16/26 Chief Financial Officer’s Press Conference
item.description: 7/16/26 Chief Financial Officer’s Press Conference first appeared on The Florida Channel On July 16th, CFO Blaise Ingoglia held a press conference from Jacksonville. Courtesy of WJAX. 7/16/26 Chief Financial Officer’s Press Conference first appeared on The Florida Channel
